title: Command Cockpit Viewport Fit
summary: Reduced cockpit overview scrolling by removing the duplicate stage-card row and compressing secondary readouts into a HUD-sized command surface.
changes: Hid the old Quest stage-card grid in Command Cockpit Overview so the level map becomes the single route-state surface.
Tightened the cockpit grid proportions around the current run and Quest route map.
Compressed signal readouts into compact two-column HUD cells.
Kept action buttons in a fixed command strip beside the route map.
Recorded the viewport-fit pass as the latest platform UI unlock in generated snapshot history.
